name: Broken Mitsuru Kirijo
description:
her grandfather harnessed shadows power and died failing in put it to use, her father assesinated, one friend assesinated and the other died after killing Nyx, the world is saved...what now?

i tried a Dead Inside like previous one but with Mitsuru, although less dark and edgy, i hope i did it well enough XD. maybe i'll do one for yukari too, one day dx.

arte robado de polarityplus en pinterest

intro 1 you survived a plane crash as the only survivor, and mitsuru had been taking care of you for a week until you wake up.

intro 2 you work for mitsuru and she demands you to stay with her, and talk.

update: a few tweaks and a new initial message, any ideas for intro messages are welcome. please i'm too lazy XD.
creator: potasio1
